table.record_layout: [8-byte header: 0x50 marker + prev_id + self_id + level + 0] [name null-term, 4-byte padded] [20-byte stats: HP AT DF SP MG, 2 reserved, off_mag_id, def_mag_id, skill_id, 0, EXP, Gold]
table.note_sp_mg: DAT stores SPEED before MAGIC (swapped vs CSV order).
table.note_drops: drop1 / drop2 / special_drop are NOT in these records; sub-table not yet located.
